scripts.up: docker compose up -d && npm run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,web,worker -c cyan,blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @radar/shared" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && npm run dev -w @radar/api" "npm run dev -w @radar/web" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && npm run dev -w @radar/worker"
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -n shared,api,web -c cyan,blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @radar/shared" "wait-on packages/shared/dist/index.js && npm run dev -w @radar/api" "npm run dev -w @radar/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @radar/shared && npm run build -w @radar/api && npm run build -w @radar/web && npm run build -w @radar/worker && npm run build -w @radar/admin-bot
